subject: fix(theme): correct status color docs, migrate PWADebugBanner
body:
1. Fix incorrect documentation about Uniwind status color limitation.

   The CLAUDE.md and global.css claimed status colors (error, success,
   warning, info) don't generate Tailwind utility classes in Uniwind.
   This is wrong — all --color-* CSS custom properties generate utilities
   identically. Verified by reading Uniwind's rule-visitor.ts source:
   processThemeRoot processes all variables uniformly with no filtering.

   Fixed: removed "inline only" annotations from CLAUDE.md color table,
   updated global.css header comment, updated Styling System description.

2. Migrate PWADebugBanner.tsx from hardcoded hex colors to useTheme().

   Replaced all #C9A57B (old rose gold) and #0A0A0A (old background)
   references with colors.primary, colors.primaryContent, colors.base100,
   colors.base200, colors.neutral, colors.baseContent from useTheme().
   Kept semantic log level colors (red/yellow/green) as fixed values
   since they represent severity, not theme.

Tags: theme, docs, bugfix, pwa-debug
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
